creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This is due to the requirement in textproc/py-python-lsp-server (py39-python-lsp-server-1.6.0):

> $ grep 2.10.0 `pkg info -l py39-python-lsp-server`
> /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/python_lsp_server-1.6.0-py3.9.egg-info/requires.txt:pycodestyle<2.10.0,>=2.9.0
> /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/python_lsp_server-1.6.0-py3.9.egg-info/requires.txt:pycodestyle<2.10.0,>=2.9.0
